pages.text:
Raychem MXSU Jointing System for Polymeric Insulated Cables
MXSU is based on a joint design using
mechanical connectors
• Mechanical connectors for conductor
and wire shield are supplied with
the kit
• Kits are widely range taking and
cover most conductor constructions
including their tolerances
• No crimping tools or tool
maintenance required
• Short and space saving design for
installation
• Improves installation reliability
• Has unlimited shelf life, simplifies
material logistics and reduces cost
• Avoids bulky waste and costly waste Mechanical shear bolt connectors TE Connectivity BSM type connectors
disposal All joint kits incorporate a Raychem used for aluminium and copper
• Exceeds international performance designed screw connector with shear conductors
standards including CENELEC HD 629 head bolts to ensure a reliable •pre-set shear torque provides safe
or IEC 60502-4 for joints pre-engineered electrical connection and reliable installation
for the different conductor materials, •removable half shell insert provide
shapes and types used in today’s core centering
network. The pre-set shear torque of •tin-plated and greased contact
the bolts ensures that the correct surface for corrosion protection
contact pressure is always achieved. •shorter length compared to
Modern jointing
The specially designed contact surface com pression connectors
Today’s jointing technology must
on the inside of the connector breaks •excellent tensile performance due
achieve higher levels of reliability and
up any conductor oxide layer and to special bolt tip design
flexibility to meet the demand of
ensures reliable service over the entire
operators who are under increasing
life time of the joint. The connectors
pressure to improve network effi ciency.
have been tested in accordance with

IEC 61238-1 class A.
resources for product selection,
outsourced services, emphasis on
repair time and a varietyof cable and
conductor types in the network, a
universal joint in cluding range taking
screw connectors ensures reliable
application and service.
Cordless impact wrench for simple
and easy installation of mechanical
connectors.

pages.text:
This is the kit...
Pre-engineered components
including mechanical shear bolt
connectors.
Summary of type tests performed on Raychem joints MXSU
CENELEC HD 629.1 S1 Raychem joints MXSU passed all tests for XLPE insulated cables according to
IEC 60502-4 CENELEC HD 629.1 S1 or IEC 60502-4 in cluding impact tests at ambient
and at low temperature.
Additional tests reflecting Raychem joints MXSU were subjected to additional tests which are not part of
future network operation any European standard but reflect future demands in modern network operation:
Overload operation of cables: More than 800 hours of electrical heat cycling
at conductor temperatures of 130 °C with a voltage of 2.5 times the operating
voltage U .
0
Oversheath testing as the routine test method of cable networks: Voltage
withstand tests between the screen wires and the water bath for 15 minutes
at 15 kV DC and at 8 kV AC.
IEC 61238-1 class A Mechanical connectors used in Raychem joints MXSU, pass the requirements in
accordance with IEC 61238-1 class A.

TE Energy – innovative and economical solutions for the electrical power industry: cable accessories, connectors & fittings,
insulators & insulation, surge arresters, switching equipment, street lighting, power measurement and control.

images.context_text: This is the kit... Pre-engineered components including mechanical shear bolt connectors. Summary of type tests performed on Raychem joints MXSU CENELEC HD 629.1 S1 Raychem joints MXSU passed all tests for XLPE insulated cables according to IEC 60502-4 CENELEC HD 629.1 S1 or IEC 60502-4 in cluding impact tests at ambient and at low temperature. Additional tests reflecting Raychem joints MXSU were subjected to additional tests which are not part of future network operation any European standard but reflect future demands in modern network operation: Overload operation of cables: More than 800 hours of electrical heat cycling at conductor temperatures of 130 °C with a voltage of 2.5 times the operating voltage U . 0 Oversheath testing as the routine test method of cable networks: Voltage withstand tests between the screen wires and the water bath for 15 minutes at 15 kV DC and at 8 kV AC. IEC 61238-1 class A Mechanical connectors used in Raychem joints MXSU, pass the requirements in accordance with IEC 61238-1 class A.
